sections.markdown:
- Activity: Day 5 with Adam
- Started: 2025-05-10 16:49
- Distance: 6.8 km
- Moving time: 36:04
- Elapsed time: 36:07
- Elevation gain: 45 m
- Average heart rate: 171.6 bpm
- Max heart rate: 193 bpm
- Average watts: 213.1 W
- Average speed: 11.3 km/h
- Apple Health recorded `3` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `145.7 bpm`, ranging from `94.0` to `182.7 bpm`.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `166.3 spm`, with a working range of `115.7` to `169.2 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `165.2 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `167.1 spm` (+1.8 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:19 /km` across `6.781 km` in `36:04` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:34 /km` and second-half pace was `5:05 /km` (-30 s/km), so pace picked up through the second half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `171.6 bpm` average and `193 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `161.6 bpm` in the first half and `183.2 bpm` in the second (+21.5 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `36:04` out of `36:07` elapsed (99.9%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `3` stop segments and `0.3%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `59.8 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `1.8 m` and `20.8 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `33.8 m` in the first half and `26.0 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed earlier.
